entries.title: Quantum resource estimates for computing elliptic curve discrete logarithms
entries.headline: Explicit Toffoli-network baseline with up to 9n + 2⌈log2 n⌉ + 10 qubits and simulated controlled point-add cores.
entries.repo_action: Keep as the oldest rigorous prime-field anchor for comparisons and sanity checks.

entries.title: Windowed quantum arithmetic
entries.headline: QROM/QROAM-style windowed arithmetic with explicit lookup/unlookup tradeoffs and table-lookup cost scaling.
entries.repo_action: Use as a primary conceptual baseline for evaluating lookup-table reshaping and signed-domain folding.

entries.title: Space-time optimized table lookup for quantum circuits
entries.headline: Systematic lookup space-time tradeoffs relevant once the repository lowers more of the lookup layer explicitly.
entries.repo_action: Track as the next backend-model refinement once current folded-lookup contracts are stable.

entries.title: Performance Analysis of a Repetition Cat Code Architecture: Computing 256-bit Elliptic Curve Logarithm in 9 Hours with 126133 Cat Qubits
entries.headline: Alternative physical architecture reference point with very different hardware assumptions.
entries.repo_action: Keep as a reference against the Cain-style neutral-atom extrapolation.

entries.title: Expressing and Analyzing Quantum Algorithms with Qualtran
entries.headline: Open-source library for representing, testing, and tabulating resource requirements of quantum algorithms.
entries.repo_action: Document as an external reimplementation target rather than importing it into the current standard-library verifier.

entries.title: A Unified Architecture for Quantum Lookup Tables
entries.headline: Parameterized QROM/SELECT-SWAP style lookup architecture with explicit qubit–T-count tradeoffs.
entries.repo_action: Use to bound how much more the repository can squeeze from lookup realization once it goes below the current ISA layer.

entries.title: Quantum schoolbook multiplication with fewer Toffoli gates
entries.headline: Controlled add-subtract multipliers asymptotically halve controlled-adder Toffoli cost.
entries.repo_action: Still one of the highest-value next branches because the corrected cost model shows arithmetic dominates the current total.

entries.title: The rise of conditionally clean ancillae for optimizing quantum circuits
entries.headline: Unary-iteration and skew-tree tricks that can change lookup and control overhead once the lookup layer is lowered more explicitly.
entries.repo_action: Document as a follow-on if the repository chooses to primitive-lower lookup address decoding and table access.

entries.title: End-to-end compilable implementation of quantum elliptic curve logarithm in Qrisp
entries.headline: One of the first fully compilable implementations of EC arithmetic in Qrisp.
entries.repo_action: Reference as a separate compilation route; do not dilute the repository's transparent verifier with framework-specific imports.

entries.title: Optimized circuits for windowed modular arithmetic with applications to quantum attacks against RSA
entries.headline: Four lookup/unlookup improvements yielding modest but real logical savings on windowed arithmetic workloads.
entries.repo_action: Use as a sanity check that lookup work often yields single-digit-percent total wins unless paired with larger architectural changes; this aligns with the new signed-fold branch.

entries.title: Validation of Quantum Elliptic Curve Point Addition Circuits
entries.headline: Shows why EC point-add circuits need aggressive validation and ancilla-cleanup scrutiny.
entries.repo_action: Strengthen red-teaming and cleanup-oriented verification rather than claiming cleanup is solved.

entries.title: Brace for impact: ECDLP challenges for quantum cryptanalysis
entries.headline: Argues for precise ECDLP benchmark suites instead of sparse toy examples.
entries.repo_action: Keep the deterministic secp-family challenge ladder and extend it over time.

entries.title: Resource analysis of Shor's elliptic curve algorithm with an improved quantum adder on a two-dimensional lattice
entries.headline: Architecture-aware P-256 resource estimates using improved adders and dynamic-circuit assumptions.
entries.repo_action: Track as an alternative physical/logical coupling branch; do not merge into the current baseline headline.

entries.title: Securing Elliptic Curve Cryptocurrencies against Quantum Vulnerabilities: Resource Estimates and Mitigations
entries.headline: Public appendix envelope of <1200 / <90M or <1450 / <70M plus ZK proof of existence without releasing the hidden circuit.
entries.repo_action: Remain the main public secp256k1 comparison baseline.

entries.title: Shor's algorithm is possible with as few as 10,000 reconfigurable atomic qubits
entries.headline: Approximate physical architecture estimates for ECC-256 / P-256 with 10,000 to 26,000 physical qubits and day-scale runtimes under aggressive parallelism assumptions.
entries.repo_action: Keep as a secondary cross-paper transfer beside the direct Microsoft Resource Estimator integration.

entries.title: Space-Efficient Quantum Algorithm for Elliptic Curve Discrete Logarithms with Resource Estimation
entries.headline: 3n + 4 floor(log2 n) modular inversion and 5n + 4 floor(log2 n) ECDLP qubit scaling; 1333 logical qubits quoted for a 256-bit prime-field curve.
entries.repo_action: Good candidate for a future ultra-low-qubit branch, but not a drop-in improvement to the current mixed-formula mainline.

entries.title: MQT QCEC repository
entries.headline: Open-source quantum circuit equivalence checker with partial-equivalence handling for ancilla and garbage qubits.
entries.repo_action: Document as the right external checker once circuit fragments are lowered to OpenQASM / primitive gates.

notes: This matrix is intentionally selective: it includes only works that materially affect how this repository should be interpreted, tested, or extended.
The checked-in cost model shows that arithmetic papers remain highly relevant, while lookup papers guide a meaningful but bounded secondary frontier.
